narrative:
Mccomb (precinct in Hancock County) has 909 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.1 percentage points.
